title: Desktop app doesn't catch task links
excerpt:
Monday desktop app (macOS) doesn’t catch any Monday links. E.g. https://example.monday.com/boards/1089048167/pulses/2482564109 
It’s very inconvenient when you share links to tasks between teammates. All links are opened…

posts.author: chimit (chimit)
posts.cookedHtml:
Monday desktop app (macOS) doesn’t catch any Monday links. E.g. https://example.monday.com/boards/1089048167/pulses/2482564109

It’s very inconvenient when you share links to tasks between teammates. All links are opened in a browser.
